Title: Create GitHub labels, milestones, and issue backlog
Description: Known fix list is converted into tracked GitHub issues with labels and milestones.
Acceptance: Every known fix has a GitHub issue with acceptance criteria.
Regression: Run issue import twice and confirm it does not duplicate issues.

Title: Add regression test harness
Description: Add typecheck, unit or integration test, and smoke-test commands so fixes cannot silently regress.
Acceptance: package.json has test scripts and public route, auth, and listing smoke coverage.
Regression: CI fails when a protected public route breaks.

Title: Expand GitHub Actions quality gate
Description: CI should run install, Prisma generate, typecheck, tests, smoke tests, build, and lint.
Acceptance: Pull requests cannot pass with build-only confidence.
Regression: Break a smoke route locally and confirm CI or tests catch it.

Title: Add PR proof template
Description: Every PR must show issue ID, commands run, test added, screenshots where relevant, and rollback notes.
Acceptance: PRs without proof are not accepted.
Regression: Create a sample PR body and verify required sections exist.

Title: Lock V1 and V2 marketplace promise
Description: Make homepage, how-it-works, listing pages, dashboard, legal, and support copy agree on what Bidra currently does.
Acceptance: No page promises escrow, in-app payment, shipping, or scheduling unless the feature fully works.
Regression: Route smoke test checks approved product-promise phrases.

Title: Make legal and trust pages public and consistent
Description: Privacy, terms, prohibited items, fees, support, safety, and feedback pages must not require login.
Acceptance: Logged-out users can access all public trust pages.
Regression: Smoke test visits each public trust route while logged out.

Title: Replace blank and loading public states
Description: Public pages must never show blank chrome or permanent Loading text.
Acceptance: Signed-out and empty states have clear explanation and CTA.
Regression: Smoke test rejects visible permanent Loading text on public routes.

Title: Fix unknown route behavior
Description: Unknown routes should render branded 404 instead of redirecting to login.
Acceptance: Random invalid public route shows 404 and no auth fallback.
Regression: Smoke test visits invalid route and expects 404 content.

Title: Fix forgot-password route
Description: Login forgot-password link must route to a working public forgot-password page.
Acceptance: User can reach forgot-password from login while logged out.
Regression: Smoke test clicks forgot-password and confirms route.

Title: Replace raw auth errors
Description: Provider codes and ugly auth strings must be replaced with clear user-safe copy.
Acceptance: Bad login shows friendly message, not raw provider error.
Regression: Auth test submits bad credentials and checks error copy.

Title: Add login rate limiting
Description: Add per-IP and per-account throttling with friendly 429 response.
Acceptance: Repeated failed login attempts are throttled.
Regression: Security test simulates repeated attempts and expects throttle.

Title: Clarify buyer seller admin role
Description: Menu and dashboard must show the current account role clearly.
Acceptance: Buyer, seller, and admin sessions are visibly distinct.
Regression: Role display test checks dashboard and header output.

Title: Make search submit on Enter
Description: Search must be a real form with submit handling and accessible button.
Acceptance: Enter key and button both navigate to results.
Regression: Smoke test types search and presses Enter.

Title: Replace raw unauthenticated listing CTA
Description: Logged-out offer and message areas should show premium sign-in prompt with return path.
Acceptance: No NOT_AUTHENTICATED text appears in UI.
Regression: Smoke test checks listing detail while logged out.

Title: Fix seller edit delete confirmation flow
Description: Seller edit links must work and delete must use branded modal with success state.
Acceptance: Seller can edit or delete listing without native confirm dialog.
Regression: Seller smoke test validates edit link and delete modal.

Title: Fix watchlist toggle and empty state
Description: Watch and unwatch should be one click with visible state, toast, and useful empty page.
Acceptance: No multiple-click watchlist behavior remains.
Regression: Watchlist smoke test toggles listing and checks empty state.

Title: Block off-platform contact details server-side
Description: Messages containing prohibited off-platform contact details should be blocked or redacted server-side and logged.
Acceptance: Client warning is not the only protection.
Regression: API test attempts phone or email and expects blocked response.

Title: Fix message sending state reliability
Description: Sending state must resolve to sent, failed, or retry. No indefinite spinner.
Acceptance: Message send cannot hang silently.
Regression: Message smoke test checks success and failure states.

Title: Add offer confirmation and instant UI update
Description: Offer submit must await API response, show confirmation, and update visible offer state.
Acceptance: User sees clear Offer sent state.
Regression: Offer smoke test submits once and checks confirmation.

Title: Prevent duplicate critical actions
Description: Signup, login, listing creation, message send, offer submit, accept offer, and reports need duplicate protection.
Acceptance: Double-click or refresh does not create duplicate critical records.
Regression: API test sends duplicate idempotency key and expects safe response.

Title: Make order feedback payment next actions clear
Description: Every order state must show one obvious next action or explanation.
Acceptance: No dead-end Pay now or Leave feedback flows.
Regression: Order smoke test checks key order states.

Title: Build admin user moderation controls
Description: Admin user detail page needs correct user mapping, strike, block, unblock, reset, and audit log.
Acceptance: Clicked user opens correct admin detail page.
Regression: Admin test opens two users and verifies distinct IDs.

Title: Build admin listing moderation controls
Description: Admin listing detail should support suspend, delete, restore, reason, and audit log.
Acceptance: Admin can moderate listing without only opening public page.
Regression: Admin test verifies moderation action creates audit entry.

Title: Replace admin native dialogs
Description: Admin confirm and prompt flows should use branded modal with clear consequences.
Acceptance: No browser alert confirm prompt remains in admin flows.
Regression: Static check rejects alert confirm prompt in admin files.

Title: Standardize toast error modal components
Description: Every success and failure should use consistent components, placement, copy, and next action.
Acceptance: No raw codes or silent failures in core flows.
Regression: Component test checks standard error and toast usage.

Title: Add marketplace SEO structure
Description: Add category, location, listing metadata, canonical URLs, sitemap coverage, and product structured data.
Acceptance: Important marketplace pages are indexable and have metadata.
Regression: Route test validates metadata on category and listing pages.

Title: Improve accessibility performance image quality
Description: Improve tap targets, keyboard navigation, image loading, and layout stability.
Acceptance: Core pages meet defined accessibility and performance checks.
Regression: A11y and smoke checks cover public browse and listing pages.

Title: Seed real marketplace liquidity
Description: Add enough real listings, remove duplicates, improve categories and locations.
Acceptance: Marketplace no longer feels empty or duplicated.
Regression: Listing audit checks duplicate titles and minimum seeded listing count in staging.
